comment: Learned prefix rules for Smart Approvals (P9.1). The hook SUGGESTS rules on unmatched REQUIRE_APPROVAL; the host persists them via `policy-gate.sh --learn`. Governance stays outside the model: this file is declarative and the model cannot rewrite it. A matching ALLOW rule upgrades REQUIRE_APPROVAL->ALLOW (auto-approve, logged); a matching DENY rule forces DENY; no match falls through to the base verdict.
